english: School. I go to school from Monday to Saturday.
japanese: 私は月曜日から土曜日まで学校に行きます。
jpg: 【1__school】I go to school from Monday to Saturday.

english: Student. My brother is a high school student.
japanese: 私の兄は高校生です。
jpg: 【2__student】My brother is a high school student.

english: English. She is very good at English. I can sing some English songs.
japanese: 彼女は英語がとても上手です。私は英語の歌をいくつか歌うことができます。
jpg: 【3__English】She is very good at English.／I can sing some English songs.

english: Japanese. You speak Japanese well. Do you like Japanese food?
japanese: あなたは日本語が上手です。日本食は好きですか？
jpg: 【4__Japanese】You speak Japanese well.／Do you like Japanese food?

english: Friend. He is my best friend.
japanese: 彼は私の親友です。
jpg: 【5__friend】He is my best friend.

english: Food. What kind of food do you like?
japanese: あなたはどんな食べ物が好きですか？
jpg: 【6__food】What kind of food do you like?

english: Family. I know his family well.
japanese: 私は彼の家族をよく知っています。
jpg: 【7__family】I know his family well.

english: Child. Do you have any children?
japanese: 子供はいますか？
jpg: 【8__child】Do you have any children?

english: Team. I am a member of the baseball team.
japanese: 私は野球チームのメンバーです。
jpg: 【9__team】I am a member of the baseball team.

english: Park. I often go to the park. Where can I park? Where can I park my car?
japanese: 私はよく公園に行きます。どこに駐車すればいいですか？車はどこに駐車できますか?
jpg: 【10__park】I often go to the park.／Where can I park?／Where can I park my car?

english: Station. Let's meet at the subway station. Do you want to work at a TV station?
japanese: 地下鉄の駅で会いましょう。テレビ局で働きたいですか？
jpg: 【11__station】Let's meet at the subway station.／Do you want to work at a TV station?

english: Train. I usually take the 8 o'clock train to school. My parents train dogs for the blind people.
japanese: 私はいつも8時の電車に乗って学校に行きます。私の両親は視覚障害者のために犬を訓練しています。
jpg: 【12__train】I usually take the 8 o'clock train to school.／My parents train dogs for the blind people.

english: Name. Please write your name here. He named his son Benjamin.
japanese: ここにあなたの名前を書いてください。彼は息子をベンジャミンと名付けました。
jpg: 【13__name】Please write your name here.／He named his son Benjamin.

english: Hello. Yeah. Hello, how are you?
japanese: こんにちは。やあ。もしもし。お元気ですか？
jpg: 【14__hello】Yeah.／Hello, how are you?

english: Sport. My favorite sports are soccer and tennis.
japanese: 私の好きなスポーツはサッカーとテニスです。
jpg: 【15__sport】My favorite sports are soccer and tennis.

english: Can. Can you swim? Yes, I can. You can go home now.
japanese: 泳げますか？はい、できます。もう家に帰っても大丈夫です。
jpg: 【16__can】Can you swim?／Yes, I can.／You can go home now.

english: People. Our neighbors are nice people.
japanese: 私たちの隣人は良い人たちです。
jpg: 【17__people】Our neighbors are nice people.

english: Go. I go to school from Monday to Friday.
japanese: 私は月曜日から金曜日まで学校に行きます。
jpg: 【18__go】I go to school from Monday to Friday.

english: Think. I think he can do it. I think that he can do it. I think so.
japanese: 彼にはそれができると思う。彼にはそれができると思う。そう思います。
jpg: 【19__think】I think he can do it.／I think that he can do it.／I think so.

english: Want. What do you want for your birthday? I want to drink something cold.
japanese: 誕生日に何が欲しいですか？冷たいものが飲みたいです。
jpg: 【20__want】What do you want for your birthday?／I want to drink something cold.

english: This. This book is very interesting. Whose bag is this? It's mine. Look at this.
japanese: この本はとても興味深いです。これは誰のバッグですか?それは私のです。これを見てください。
jpg: 【21__this】This book is very interesting.／Whose bag is this?／It's mine.／Look at this.

english: Make. I make ham sandwiches every Saturday. The news made us happy.
japanese: 私は毎週土曜日にハムサンドイッチを作ります。そのニュースは私たちを幸せにしました。
jpg: 【22__make】I make ham sandwiches every Saturday.／The news made us happy.

english: What. What is your dog's name? His name is Max. What color is your dress? What a good idea. What a good idea it is.
japanese: あなたの犬の名前は何ですか?彼の名前はマックスです。あなたのドレスは何色ですか？なんとも良いアイデアですね。なんとも良いアイデアですね。
jpg: 【23__what】What is your dog's name?／His name is Max.／What color is your dress?／What a good idea.／What a good idea it is.

english: See. You can see Mount Fuji from here. I want to see her. I can't see the point. I see. Let me see. Let's see. Long time no see.
japanese: ここからは富士山が見えます。彼女に会いたい。要点がわかりません。なるほど。そうねぇ。見てみましょう。お久しぶりです。
jpg: 【24__see】You can see Mount Fuji from here.／I want to see her.／I can't see the point.／I see.／Let me see.／Let's see.／Long time no see.

english: To. How can I get to the station? I was busy from morning to night yesterday.
japanese: どうやって駅まで行けますか？昨日は朝から晩まで忙しかったです。
jpg: 【25__to】How can I get to the station?／I was busy from morning to night yesterday.

english: In. He is in the gym now. Can you come in the morning? Please speak in English here. Now, come in and close the door.
japanese: 彼は今ジムにいます。朝来てもらえますか？ここでは英語で話してください。さあ、入ってドアを閉めてください。
jpg: 【26__in】He is in the gym now.／Can you come in the morning?／Please speak in English here.／Now, come in and close the door.

english: And. Tom and Bob are brothers. I went to the restaurant and ate lunch. Hurry up. And you can catch the one o'clock train.
japanese: トムとボブは兄弟です。私はレストランに行って昼食を食べました。急いで。そして、1時の電車に乗れます。
jpg: 【27__and】Tom and Bob are brothers.／I went to the restaurant and ate lunch.／Hurry up.／And you can catch the one o'clock train.

english: They. They are all from China.
japanese: 彼らは全員中国出身です。
jpg: 【28__they】They are all from China.

english: Good. This is good. Have a good time.
japanese: これは良いですね。楽しい時間をお過ごしください。
jpg: 【29__good】This is good.／Have a good time.

english: Like. I like music. I want to be a player like him.
japanese: 私は音楽が好きです。私も彼のような選手になりたいです。
jpg: 【30__like】I like music.／I want to be a player like him.

english: Know. Do you know his email address?
japanese: 彼のメールアドレスを知っていますか?
jpg: 【31__know】Do you know his email address?

english: Thing. I want to eat sweet things.
japanese: 甘いものが食べたいです。
jpg: 【32__thing】I want to eat sweet things.

english: Use. Do you often use your smartphone?
japanese: スマートフォンをよく使いますか？
jpg: 【33__use】Do you often use your smartphone?

english: Come. Please come to me at 5 o'clock. I can come to you on Saturday.
japanese: 5時に私のところに来てください。土曜日には来れますよ。
jpg: 【34__come】Please come to me at 5 o'clock.／I can come to you on Saturday.

english: Yes. Do you know him? Yes, I do.
japanese: 彼を知っていますか？はい、知っています。
jpg: 【35__yes】Do you know him?／Yes, I do.

english: Now. Are you free now? Go now! Now listen.
japanese: 今は空いていますか？今すぐ行きましょう！さあ聞いてください。
jpg: 【36__now】Are you free now?／Go now!／Now listen.

english: Of. I often read books in the library of our school. All of us agree with him. I like the paintings of the painter.
japanese: 私は学校の図書室でよく本を読みます。私たち全員が彼の意見に同意します。私はその画家の絵が好きです。
jpg: 【37__of】I often read books in the library of our school.／All of us agree with him.／I like the paintings of the painter.

english: Do. Do you like soccer? Yes I do. No, I do not. No, I don't. What do you do on Sunday?
japanese: サッカーは好きですか？はい、そうです。いいえ、違います。いいえ、私はしません。日曜日は何をしますか?
jpg: 【38__do】Do you like soccer?／Yes I do.／No, I do not.／No, I don't.／What do you do on Sunday?

english: That. I like that movie. What is that? It's a paper plane. Don't do that again.
japanese: 私はその映画が好きです。それは何ですか？それは紙飛行機です。二度とそんなことしないでください。
jpg: 【39__that】I like that movie.／What is that?／It's a paper plane.／Don't do that again.

english: Have. I have a sister. Let's have lunch in the park.
japanese: 私には妹がいます。公園でお昼を食べましょう。
jpg: 【40__have】I have a sister.／Let's have lunch in the park.

english: For. They sell t-shirts for big people at the store. We want to stay here for three days. Too much salt is not good for your health.
japanese: 彼らは店で大きな人向けのTシャツを販売しています。私たちはここに3日間滞在したいと思っています。塩分の摂りすぎは健康に良くありません。
jpg: 【41__for】They sell t-shirts for big people at the store.／We want to stay here for three days.／Too much salt is not good for your health.

english: About. Let's do something about the problem. The man is about 20 years old.
japanese: その問題について何かをしましょう。男は20歳くらいです。
jpg: 【42__about】Let's do something about the problem.／The man is about 20 years old.

english: His. Is this your book? No, it is his.
japanese: これはあなたの本ですか？いいえ、それは彼のものです。
jpg: 【43__his】Is this your book?／No, it is his.

english: Tell. Please tell me the way to the station.
japanese: 駅までの道を教えてください。
jpg: 【44__tell】Please tell me the way to the station.

english: Not. I am not hungry.
japanese: お腹は空いていません。
jpg: 【45__not】I am not hungry.

english: Well. Get well soon. She sings well. Well, let me see.
japanese: お早い回復を願っております。彼女は上手に歌います。まあ、見てみましょう。
jpg: 【46__well】Get well soon.／She sings well.／Well, let me see.

english: First. What is the first month of the year? January is. What do you want to do first? When is your birthday? October 1st. October the first.
japanese: 年の最初の月は何月ですか?1月。まず何をしたいですか？あなたの誕生日はいつですか？10月1日。１０月１日。
jpg: 【47__first】What is the first month of the year?／January is.／What do you want to do first?／When is your birthday?／October 1st.／October the first.

english: Play. Let's play basketball. She can play the piano. They are going to perform a play this fall.
japanese: バスケットボールをしましょう。彼女はピアノを弾くことができます。彼らはこの秋に演劇を上演する予定です。
jpg: 【48__play】Let's play basketball.／She can play the piano.／They are going to perform a play this fall.

english: Say. He said, how are you? The sign says, no smoking.
japanese: 彼は言い​​ました、「調子はどうですか？」標識には禁煙と書かれています。
jpg: 【49__say】He said, how are you?／The sign says, no smoking.

english: With. I live with my parents and grandmother. Do you know the woman with red hair? Clean the table with a cloth.
japanese: 私は両親と祖母と住んでいます。あなたは赤い髪の女性を知っていますか？テーブルを布で拭きます。
jpg: 【50__with】I live with my parents and grandmother.／Do you know the woman with red hair?／Clean the table with a cloth.

english: At. What time do you arrive at the station? We eat dinner at 7 o'clock.
japanese: 何時に駅に着きますか？私たちは7時に夕食を食べます。
jpg: 【51__at】What time do you arrive at the station?／We eat dinner at 7 o'clock.

english: But. I like meat. But she likes vegetables.
japanese: 私は肉が好きです。でも彼女は野菜が好きです。
jpg: 【52__but】I like meat.／But she likes vegetables.

english: When. When do you practice tennis? After school and on Sundays.
japanese: あなたはいつテニスを練習しますか？放課後と日曜日。
jpg: 【53__when】When do you practice tennis?／After school and on Sundays.

english: So. Why do you think so? Thank you so much. I'm hungry, so I want to eat a lot.
japanese: なぜそう思いますか?どうもありがとう。お腹が空いたのでたくさん食べたいです。
jpg: 【54__so】Why do you think so?／Thank you so much.／I'm hungry, so I want to eat a lot.

english: Many. How many books do you have? Many of those people live in this area.
japanese: 何冊本を持っていますか？そうした人々の多くがこの地域に住んでいます。
jpg: 【55__many】How many books do you have?／Many of those people live in this area.

english: Very. Please use it very carefully.
japanese: 十分に注意してご使用ください。
jpg: 【56__very】Please use it very carefully.

english: There. I saw him there two days ago. There are many famous temples in Kyoto.
japanese: 私は二日前にそこで彼を見かけました。京都には有名なお寺がたくさんあります。
jpg: 【57__there】I saw him there two days ago.／There are many famous temples in Kyoto.

english: On. Put it on the table. I play soccer on Sundays. I found this information on the internet. She stopped, looked around, and walked on.
japanese: テーブルの上に置きます。私は日曜日にサッカーをします。この情報をインターネットで見つけました。彼女は立ち止まり、周りを見回し、そして歩き続けました。
jpg: 【58__on】Put it on the table.／I play soccer on Sundays.／I found this information on the internet.／She stopped, looked around, and walked on.

english: From. The store is open from 10 o'clock. Our English teacher is from California.
japanese: お店は10時からオープンしています。私たちの英語の先生はカリフォルニア出身です。
jpg: 【59__from】The store is open from 10 o'clock.／Our English teacher is from California.

english: Them. Let's play soccer with them on Sunday.
japanese: 日曜日に彼らとサッカーをしましょう。
jpg: 【60__them】Let's play soccer with them on Sunday.

english: Some. I can see some people at the gate. Most birds can fly, but some cannot.
japanese: 門のところに何人かの人が見えます。ほとんどの鳥は飛ぶことができますが、飛べない鳥もいます。
jpg: 【61__some】I can see some people at the gate.／Most birds can fly, but some cannot.

english: One. Take one at a time. You have two dictionaries. Please lend me one. She is only one year old.
japanese: 一度に1つずつ摂取してください。あなたは辞書を 2 冊持っています。一つ貸してください。彼女はまだ1歳です。
jpg: 【62__one】Take one at a time.／You have two dictionaries.／Please lend me one.／She is only one year old.

english: Day. The day after Monday is Tuesday. Please talk about your school days. What day is it today?
japanese: 月曜日の翌日は火曜日です。学生時代のことを話してください。今日は何の日ですか?
jpg: 【63__day】The day after Monday is Tuesday.／Please talk about your school days.／What day is it today?

english: How. How do I get to the station from here? How long is the river? How are you now? How pretty the girl is.
japanese: ここから駅まではどうやって行けますか?川の長さはどれくらいですか？今はどうですか？その女の子はなんてかわいいんだろう。
jpg: 【64__how】How do I get to the station from here?／How long is the river?／How are you now?／How pretty the girl is.

english: Their. Is their team strong?
japanese: 彼らのチームは強いですか？
jpg: 【65__their】Is their team strong?

english: Talk. Don't talk in class. My parents want to have a talk with you.
japanese: 授業中は話さないでください。私の両親はあなたと話したいと思っています。
jpg: 【66__talk】Don't talk in class.／My parents want to have a talk with you.

english: Time. Do you have some time? How many times a week do you practice tennis? What time is it?
japanese: 少し時間はありますか？あなたは週に何回テニスの練習をしますか。今何時ですか？
jpg: 【67__time】Do you have some time?／How many times a week do you practice tennis?／What time is it?

english: Look. Please look at me. You look happy at the news. Come and take a look at this. Come and have a look at this.
japanese: 私を見てください。あなたはそのニュースを見て幸せそうに見えます。来てこれを見てください。来てこれを見てください。
jpg: 【68__look】Please look at me.／You look happy at the news.／Come and take a look at this.／Come and have a look at this.

english: Other. Do you play any other sports? One half of the apple is for you, and the other for me.
japanese: 他に何かスポーツをしますか？リンゴの半分はあなたのもので、もう半分は私のものです。
jpg: 【69__other】Do you play any other sports?／One half of the apple is for you, and the other for me.

english: Learn. I want to learn karate.
japanese: 空手を習いたいです。
jpg: 【70__learn】I want to learn karate.

english: Enjoy! I enjoyed watching that movie.
japanese: 私はその映画を見て楽しかったです。
jpg: 【71__enjoy】I enjoyed watching that movie.

english: Year. I want to go there this year. The boy is six years old.
japanese: 今年はそこに行きたいです。男の子は6歳です。
jpg: 【72__year】I want to go there this year.／The boy is six years old.

english: Work. I want to work for a bank. These computers don't work. I have a lot of work today. I have the complete works of Shakespeare.
japanese: 銀行で働きたいです。これらのコンピュータは動作しません。今日は仕事がたくさんあります。私はシェイクスピアの全作品を持っています。
jpg: 【73__work】I want to work for a bank.／These computers don't work.／I have a lot of work today.／I have the complete works of Shakespeare.

english: Get. I got a new bike for my birthday. She got sleepy soon. What time do you get there?
japanese: 誕生日に新しい自転車を買ってもらいました。彼女はすぐに眠くなった。何時にそこに着きますか？
jpg: 【74__get】I got a new bike for my birthday.／She got sleepy soon.／What time do you get there?

english: After. We play baseball after lunch every day. You always come home after we finish dinner. I come here on time. And you always arrive soon after.
japanese: 私たちは毎日昼食後に野球をします。あなたはいつも私たちが夕食を終えた後に帰ってきます。私は時間通りにここに来ます。そしていつもすぐに到着します。
jpg: 【75__after】We play baseball after lunch every day.／You always come home after we finish dinner.／I come here on time.／And you always arrive soon after.

english: Also, He is an actor and also writes books.
japanese: 彼は俳優であり、本も書いています。
jpg: 【76__also】He is an actor and also writes books.

english: By. Stand by the window, please. Many students go to school by bike. Come back by six.
japanese: 窓のそばに立ってください。多くの学生は自転車で学校に通っています。6時までに戻ってきてください。
jpg: 【77__by】Stand by the window, please.／Many students go to school by bike.／Come back by six.

english: Then. Where were you then? Go straight on about a hundred meters, then turn left. Go straight on about a hundred meters and then turn left. It's raining. Then we cannot go out.
japanese: その時どこにいたの？百メートルほど直進し、左折してください。百メートルほど直進し、左折してください。雨が降っている。そうなると外に出られなくなります。
jpg: 【78__then】Where were you then?／Go straight on about a hundred meters, then turn left.／Go straight on about a hundred meters and then turn left.／It's raining.／Then we cannot go out.

english: Take. He took me by the hand. Take an umbrella with you. I'll take it.
japanese: 彼は私の手を取りました。傘を持って行きましょう。買います。
jpg: 【79__take】He took me by the hand.／Take an umbrella with you.／I'll take it.

english: Help. I want to help people in need. Please help me move the table. Please help me to move the table. I need your help.
japanese: 困っている人を助けたい。テーブルを移動するのを手伝ってください。テーブルを移動するのを手伝ってください。あなたの助けが必要です。
jpg: 【80__help】I want to help people in need.／Please help me move the table.／Please help me to move the table.／I need your help.

english: Be. I want to be at home this evening.
japanese: 今晩は家にいたいです。
jpg: 【81__be】I want to be at home this evening.

english: Happy. It is sunny, so I am happy. You look happy.
japanese: 晴れたので嬉しいです。幸せそうだね。
jpg: 【82__happy】It is sunny, so I am happy.／You look happy.

english: Country.I want to travel all over the country. I like living in the country.
japanese: 私は国中を旅行したい。私は田舎に住むのが好きです。
jpg: 【83__country】I like living in the country.

english: Try. This is good. Please try it.
japanese: これは良いですね。ぜひお試しください。
jpg: 【84__try】This is good.／Please try it.

english: Too. I want to buy a new bag too. Don't eat too much.
japanese: 新しいバッグも買いたいです。食べ過ぎないでください。
jpg: 【85__too】I want to buy a new bag too.／Don't eat too much.

english: Visit. I want to visit a friend in New York. This is my first visit to Hawaii.
japanese: ニューヨークにいる友人に会いに行きたいです。私にとって初めてのハワイ訪問です。
jpg: 【86__visit】I want to visit a friend in New York.／This is my first visit to Hawaii.

english: Next. Can you come to my house next Sunday? What do you do next?
japanese: 今度の日曜日に私の家に来てもらえますか？次に何をしますか?
jpg: 【87__next】Can you come to my house next Sunday?／What do you do next?

english: Study. I study before dinner every day. His study of movies is very good.
japanese: 私は毎日夕食前に勉強します。彼の映画の研究はとても上手です。
jpg: 【88__study】I study before dinner every day.／His study of movies is very good.

english: Ask. I want to ask him about it. Well, you want to ask me for help. May I ask you a question?
japanese: それについて彼に聞きたいです。そうですね、私に助けを求めたいのですね。質問してもいいですか？
jpg: 【89__ask】I want to ask him about it.／Well, you want to ask me for help.／May I ask you a question?

english: Idea. I have an idea.
japanese: 考えがあります。
jpg: 【90__idea】I have an idea.

english: Read. I like reading books.
japanese: 私は本を​​読むのが好きです。
jpg: 【91__read】I like reading books.

english: New. I want to buy a new video game.
japanese: 新しいテレビゲームを買いたいです。
jpg: 【92__new】I want to buy a new video game.

english: Heart. I love her from the bottom of my heart. You have a weak heart.
japanese: 私は心の底から彼女を愛しています。あなたは心臓が弱いのです。
jpg: 【93__heart】I love her from the bottom of my heart.／You have a weak heart.

english: Give. Please give a sandwich to me.
japanese: 私にサンドイッチをください。
jpg: 【94__give】Please give a sandwich to me.

english: Right. You can see Mount Fuji on the right hand. You're right. Turn right at the corner, please. You can see a lake on your right. We fight for the rights of women. That's right.
japanese: 右手に富士山が見えます。あなたが正しい。角を右折してください。右手に湖が見えます。私たちは女性の権利のために戦います。それは正しい。
jpg: 【95__right】You can see Mount Fuji on the right hand.／You're right.／Turn right at the corner, please.／You can see a lake on your right.／We fight for the rights of women.／That's right.

english: Become. I want to become a teacher.
japanese: 私は教師になりたいです。
jpg: 【96__become】I want to become a teacher.

english: High. The mountain is about 3,000 meters high. The birds fly high up in the sky.
japanese: その山の高さは約3,000メートルです。鳥は空高く飛んでいきます。
jpg: 【97__high】The mountain is about 3,000 meters high.／The birds fly high up in the sky.

english: Really? I really saw it. Please believe me.
japanese: 本当に見たよ。信じてください。
jpg: 【98__really】I really saw it.／Please believe me.

english: Who. Who is your teacher?
japanese: あなたの先生は誰ですか?
jpg: 【99__who】Who is your teacher?

english: Why? Why do you go there?
japanese: なぜそこに行くのですか？
jpg: 【100__why】Why do you go there?

english: All. All my friends like soccer. All of my friends agree with my plan.
japanese: 私の友達はみんなサッカーが好きです。私の友達は全員私の計画に同意します。
jpg: 【101__all】All my friends like soccer.／All of my friends agree with my plan.

english: Hear.I can hear a strange sound. I hear you are from New York.
japanese: 何か変な音が聞こえる。あなたはニューヨーク出身だと聞きました。
jpg: 【102__hear】I can hear a strange sound.／I hear you are from New York.

english: Mr. How are you, Mr.Brown?
japanese: ブラウンさん、調子はどうですか？
jpg: 【103__Mr.】How are you, Mr.Brown?

english: Show. Please show the pictures of your childhood to us. Please show me the way. I want to see the show on TV.
japanese: あなたの子供の頃の写真を私たちに見せてください。道を教えてください。その番組をテレビで見たいです。
jpg: 【104__show】Please show the pictures of your childhood to us.／Please show me the way.／I want to see the show on TV.

english: Start. The movie starts at 6 o'clock. Let's start the meeting.
japanese: 映画は6時に始まります。会議を始めましょう。
jpg: 【105__start】The movie starts at 6 o'clock.／Let's start the meeting.

english: Hard. This bread is hard. You often ask hard questions. We practice baseball hard.
japanese: このパンは硬いです。あなたはよく難しい質問をします。私たちは野球を一生懸命練習します。
jpg: 【106__hard】This bread is hard.／You often ask hard questions.／We practice baseball hard.

english: Every. I know the name and face of every student in my class. Buses come every 10 minutes.
japanese: 私はクラスの生徒全員の名前と顔を知っています。バスは10分ごとに来ます。
jpg: 【107__every】I know the name and face of every student in my class.／Buses come every 10 minutes.

english: Picture. I like drawing a picture. I like painting a picture. I like these pictures of the mountain.
japanese: 私は絵を描くのが好きです。私は絵を描くのが好きです。こういう山の写真が好きです。
jpg: 【108__picture】I like drawing a picture.／I like painting a picture.／I like these pictures of the mountain.

english: Something. I have something for you. Do you want to drink something hot?
japanese: あなたに渡したいものがあります。何か温かいものを飲みたいですか？
jpg: 【109__something】I have something for you.／Do you want to drink something hot?

english: Last. Can I take the last cookie? I went to Kyoto last spring. I want to eat at last.
japanese: 最後のクッキーを取ってもいいですか？去年の春に京都に行きました。やっと食べられる。
jpg: 【110__last】Can I take the last cookie?／I went to Kyoto last spring.／I want to eat at last.

english: Way.Could you tell me the way to the station? You speak to people in a gentle way. Come this way, please.
japanese: 駅への行き方を教えていただけますか？あなたは人々に優しい口調で話します。こちらに来てください。
jpg: 【111__way】Could you tell me the way to the station? ／You speak to people in a gentle way.／Come this way, please.

english: Much. We don't have much time. These shoes are much too big. I don't know much about the cause of the accident.
japanese: 時間があまりありません。この靴は大きすぎます。事故の原因についてはよくわかりません。
jpg: 【112__much】We don't have much time.／These shoes are much too big.／I don't know much about the cause of the accident.

english: Eat. I ate a big lunch.
japanese: ランチをたくさん食べました。
jpg: 【113__eat】I ate a big lunch.

english: World. I want to travel the world.
japanese: 世界を旅したいです。
jpg: 【114__world】I want to travel the world.

english: Life. I want to save the child's life. Do you want to change your life? I want to live here all my life.
japanese: 子供の命を救いたい。人生を変えたいですか？一生ここに住みたいです。
jpg: 【115__life】I want to save the child's life.／Do you want to change your life?／I want to live here all my life.

english: Old. My father's car is very old. My grandma is old but still healthy.
japanese: 私の父の車はとても古いです。私の祖母は高齢ですが、まだ健康です。
jpg: 【116__old】My father's car is very old.／My grandma is old but still healthy.

english: Write. What do you write in the birthday card for her?
japanese: 彼女への誕生日カードに何を書きますか?
jpg: 【117__write】What do you write in the birthday card for her?

english: Understand. I can understand your feelings.
japanese: あなたの気持ちはわかります。
jpg: 【118__understand】I can understand your feelings.

english: Place. Is Tokyo an exciting place for you? Don't place your bag on the table.
japanese: 東京はあなたにとって刺激的な場所ですか?カバンをテーブルの上に置かないでください。
jpg: 【119__place】Is Tokyo an exciting place for you?／Don't place your bag on the table.

english: Kind. She is a very kind and warm person. You can see many kinds of animals at the zoo.
japanese: 彼女はとても親切で温かい人です。動物園ではたくさんの種類の動物を見ることができます。
jpg: 【120__kind】She is a very kind and warm person.／You can see many kinds of animals at the zoo.

english: Or. You can drink milk or apple juice. Get up or you'll be late for school.
japanese: 牛乳やリンゴジュースを飲むこともできます。起きなさい、そうでないと学校に遅刻しますよ。
jpg: 【121__or】You can drink milk or apple juice.／Get up or you'll be late for school.

english: Class.I have an English class today. Some students in the class can play the piano.
japanese: 今日は英語のクラスがあります。クラスの何人かの生徒はピアノを弾くことができます。
jpg: 【122__class】Some students in the class can play the piano.

english: Future. What can we do for our future? We often talk about our future dreams.
japanese: 私たちの未来のために何ができるでしょうか？私たちはよく将来の夢について話します。
jpg: 【123__future】What can we do for our future?／We often talk about our future dreams.

english: Need. Do you need this book? We understand the needs for more money.
japanese: この本は必要ですか?私たちはさらなる資金が必要であることを理解しています。
jpg: 【124__need】Do you need this book?／We understand the needs for more money.

english: Word. What is the meaning of this word?
japanese: この言葉の意味は何でしょうか？
jpg: 【125__word】What is the meaning of this word?

english: City. Do you know the history of this city well?
japanese: この街の歴史をよく知っていますか？
jpg: 【126__city】Do you know the history of this city well?

english: Today. Today is Tuesday. It is rainy today.
japanese: 今日は火曜日です。今日は雨です。
jpg: 【127__today】Today is Tuesday.／It is rainy today.

english: Game. Our team won the game.
japanese: 私たちのチームが試合に勝ちました。
jpg: 【128__game】Our team won the game.

english: Feel. I feel hungry. What do you feel about his plan? I feel (that) you need a rest.
japanese: お腹が空いた気がします。彼の計画についてどう思いますか?あなたには休息が必要だと思います。
jpg: 【129__feel】I feel hungry.／What do you feel about his plan?／I feel (that) you need a rest.

english: Great! His new book is a great success. That's great.
japanese: 彼の新しい本は大成功です。それは素晴らしいことです。
jpg: 【130__great】His new book is a great success.／That's great.

english: Please. Please come in.
japanese: どうぞお入りください。
jpg: 【131__please】Please come in.

english: Different. She is a little different from other girls.
japanese: 彼女は他の女の子とは少し違う。
jpg: 【132__different】She is a little different from other girls.

english: Here. Come here and have a look at this. You can see the building from here.
japanese: ここに来て、これを見てください。ここから建物が見えます。
jpg: 【133__here】Come here and have a look at this.／You can see the building from here.

english: Home. Their home is small but beautiful. Go home now. We sometimes go to her home party.
japanese: 彼らの家は小さいですが美しいです。もう家に帰りなさい。私たちは時々彼女のホームパーティーに行きます。
jpg: 【134__home】Their home is small but beautiful.／Go home now.／We sometimes go to her home party.

english: Which. Which is yours? This one? Which bag do you want?
japanese: どれがあなたのものですか？これです？どのバッグが欲しいですか？
jpg: 【135__which】Which is yours?／This one?／Which bag do you want?

english: Interested. They have a party. Are you interested?
japanese: 彼らはパーティーを開きます。興味がありますか？
jpg: 【136__interested】They have a party.／Are you interested?

english: Interesting. His story is very interesting to us.
japanese: 彼の話は私たちにとってとても興味深いです。
jpg: 【137__interesting】His story is very interesting to us.

english: No. We have no food now. Do you know his telephone number? No, I don't.
japanese: 今は食べ物がありません。彼の電話番号を知っていますか?いいえ、私はしません。
jpg: 【138__no】We have no food now.／Do you know his telephone number?／No, I don't.

english: Before. Come back before dinner. I was there the day before. Wash your hands before you eat.
japanese: 夕食前に戻ってきてください。前日もそこにいました。食べる前に手を洗ってください。
jpg: 【139__before】Come back before dinner.／I was there the day before.／Wash your hands before you eat.

english: Each. I have a bag in each hand. I give a present to each of her children.
japanese: 私は両手にカバンを持っています。私は彼女の子供たち一人一人にプレゼントをあげます。
jpg: 【140__each】I have a bag in each hand.／I give a present to each of her children.

english: Together. We want to travel together.
japanese: 一緒に旅行したいです。
jpg: 【141__together】We want to travel together.

english: Beautiful. You look beautiful in that dress.
japanese: あなたはそのドレスを着ると美しく見えます。
jpg: 【142__beautiful】You look beautiful in that dress.

english: Join. I want to join the English speech contest.
japanese: 英語スピーチコンテストに参加したいです。
jpg: 【143__join】I want to join the English speech contest.

english: Practice. I practice the guitar every day. You need a little more practice.
japanese: 私は毎日ギターを練習します。もう少し練習が必要です。
jpg: 【144__practice】I practice the guitar every day.／You need a little more practice.

english: Answer. Please answer my questions. Do you know the answer to the question?
japanese: 私の質問に答えてください。質問の答えを知っていますか?
jpg: 【145__answer】Please answer my questions.／Do you know the answer to the question?

english: Only. This is my only son. I play soccer only on weekends.
japanese: これは私の一人息子です。私は週末だけサッカーをします。
jpg: 【146__only】This is my only son.／I play soccer only on weekends.

english: Example.Please give an example of his honesty.
japanese: 彼の誠実さを示す例を挙げてください。
jpg: 【147__example】Please give an example of his honesty.

english: These. These are my shoes. What is the difference between these two?
japanese: これらは私の靴です。これら 2 つの違いは何ですか?
jpg: 【148__these】These are my shoes.／What is the difference between these two?

english: Around. Let's run around the playground. We eat dinner around 7 o'clock. The lake is 10 miles around.
japanese: 遊び場を走り回ってみましょう。私たちは7時頃に夕食を食べます。湖は周囲16マイルです。
jpg: 【149__around】Let's run around the playground.／We eat dinner around 7 o'clock.／The lake is 10 miles around.

english: Hope. I hope you like this. I hope that you like this. All of them have many hopes and dreams. I hope so.
japanese: 気に入っていただければ幸いです。気に入っていただければ幸いです。彼らは皆、たくさんの希望と夢を持っています。そうだといい。
jpg: 【150__hope】I hope you like this.／I hope that you like this.／All of them have many hopes and dreams.／I hope so.

english: Speak. Can you really speak three languages?
japanese: 本当に3か国語を話すことができますか？
jpg: 【151__speak】Can you really speak three languages?

english: Problem. How can we find the answer to the problem? No problem.
japanese: どうすれば問題の答えを見つけられるでしょうか?問題ない。
jpg: 【152__problem】How can we find the answer to the problem?／No problem.

english: OK.  Let's go to the movies today. OK. What time?
japanese: 今日は映画に行きましょう。わかりました。何時？
jpg: 【153__OK】Let's go to the movies today.／OK.／What time?

english: Festival. We have a summer festival in the park.
japanese: 私たちは公園で夏祭りを開催します。
jpg: 【154__festival】We have a summer festival in the park.

english: Week. I am very busy this week.
japanese: 今週はとても忙しいです。
jpg: 【155__week】I am very busy this week.

english: Big. These shoes are too big for me.
japanese: この靴は私には大きすぎます。
jpg: 【156__big】These shoes are too big for me.

english: Could. I could not meet him.
japanese: 彼には会えなかった。
jpg: 【157__could】I could not meet him.

english: Often. I often see him at the station.
japanese: 私は駅で彼をよく見かけます。
jpg: 【158__often】I often see him at the station.

english: Taste. These apples taste good. These fruits have a sweet taste.
japanese: これらのリンゴはおいしいです。これらの果物は甘い味がします。
jpg: 【159__taste】These apples taste good.／These fruits have a sweet taste.

english: Clean. Are your hands clean? I clean my room once a week.
japanese: あなたの手はきれいですか？私は週に一度部屋を掃除します。
jpg: 【160__clean】Are your hands clean?／I clean my room once a week.

english: Mean.What does this word mean?
japanese: この単語はどういう意味ですか？
jpg: 【161__mean】What does this word mean?

english: Always. The sun always rises in the east and sets in the west.
japanese: 太陽は常に東から昇り、西に沈みます。
jpg: 【162__always】The sun always rises in the east and sets in the west.

english: Difficult. The job is very difficult for me. It is difficult for her to get up early.
japanese: その仕事は私にとってとても難しいです。彼女は早く起きるのが難しい。
jpg: 【163__difficult】The job is very difficult for me.／It is difficult for her to get up early.

english: Job. What kind of job do you want to do in the future?
japanese: 将来はどんな仕事をしたいですか？
jpg: 【164__job】What kind of job do you want to do in the future?

english: Sure. Do you want to come with me? Sure. He is sure to come.
japanese: 私と一緒に来ますか？もちろん。彼は必ず来ます。
jpg: 【165__sure】Do you want to come with me?／Sure.／He is sure to come.

english: Later. Please call me later.
japanese: 後で電話してください。
jpg: 【166__later】Please call me later.

english: Month. I visit my grandparents every month. I visit my grandparents once a month.
japanese: 私は毎月祖父母を訪問します。私は月に一度祖父母を訪ねます。
jpg: 【167__month】I visit my grandparents every month.／I visit my grandparents once a month.

english: buy. I want to buy a t-shirt.
japanese: Tシャツを買いたいです。
jpg: 【168__buy】I want to buy a t-shirt.

english: Long. The bridge is 3 kilometers long. Does it take long? So long.
japanese: 橋の長さは3キロメートルです。時間がかかりますか？さよなら。
jpg: 【169__long】The bridge is 3 kilometers long.／Does it take long?／So long.

english: Ms. Hello Ms.Smith, how are you?
japanese: こんにちは、スミスさん、お元気ですか？
jpg: 【170__Ms.】Hello Ms.Smith, how are you?

english: Watch. We like to watch baseball on TV. I want to buy a new watch.
japanese: 私たちはテレビで野球を見るのが好きです。新しい時計を買いたいです。
jpg: 【171__watch】We like to watch baseball on TV.／I want to buy a new watch.

english: Hi. Yeah. Hi, how are you?
japanese: こんにちは、元気ですか？
jpg: 【172__hi】Hi, how are you?

english: Meet. They are. Let's meet at three on Friday next week. Nice to meet you.
japanese: 彼らです。来週の金曜日の３時に会いましょう。はじめまして。
jpg: 【173__meet】They are.／Let's meet at three on Friday next week.／Nice to meet you.

english: Everyone. Everyone knows that. Not everyone can succeed.
japanese: それは誰もが知っています。誰もが成功できるわけではありません。
jpg: 【174__everyone】Everyone knows that.／Not everyone can succeed.

english: Smile. You have a beautiful smile. She smiles at everyone.
japanese: 笑顔が素敵ですね。彼女は誰にでも微笑みかけます。
jpg: 【175__smile】You have a beautiful smile.／She smiles at everyone.

english: Call. Please call me tonight. I sometimes call to him for help. Call me Tim. I get a phone call from him every day.
japanese: 今夜電話してください。私は時々彼に助けを求めます。ティムと呼んでください。彼から毎日電話がかかってきます。
jpg: 【176__call】Please call me tonight.／I sometimes call to him for help.／Call me Tim.／I get a phone call from him every day.

english: Stay. How many days do you want to stay? He stays active in his old age. During my stay in London, I want to visit the British Museum.
japanese: 何日間滞在したいですか？彼は高齢になっても活動を続けている。ロンドン滞在中に大英博物館を訪れたいと思っています。
jpg: 【177__stay】How many days do you want to stay?／He stays active in his old age.／During my stay in London, I want to visit the British Museum.

english: Walk. I can't walk anymore. It is about a 10 minute walk from here.
japanese: もう歩けない。ここからは徒歩約10分です。
jpg: 【178__walk】I can't walk anymore.／It is about a 10 minute walk from here.

english: Club.  What club do you want to join?
japanese: どのクラブに入りたいですか?
jpg: 【179__club】What club do you want to join?

english: Up. We see a plane high up in the sky. Let's go up the stairs.
japanese: 空高くに飛行機が見えます。階段を上ってみましょう。
jpg: 【180__up】We see a plane high up in the sky.／Let's go up the stairs.

english: Morning. I get up early in the morning. Good morning.
japanese: 私は朝早く起きます。おはよう。
jpg: 【181__morning】I get up early in the morning.／Good morning.

english: Teach. He is teaching at this school. He is teaching history at this school.
japanese: 彼はこの学校で教えています。彼はこの学校で歴史を教えています。
jpg: 【182__teach】He is teaching at this school.／He is teaching history at this school.

english: Popular 人気のある。 The game is very popular with young people. The game is very popular among young people.
japanese: そのゲームは若者の間でとても人気があります。
jpg: 【183__popular】The game is very popular among young people.

english: Question. Can I ask you some questions? What do you think of the question of global warming?
japanese: いくつか質問してもいいですか？地球温暖化の問題についてどう思いますか?
jpg: 【184__question】Can I ask you some questions?／What do you think of the question of global warming?

english: Any. Do you have any pets? I don't have any money with me now. You can come to me anytime.
japanese: ペットを飼っていますか?今はお金を持っていません。いつでも私のところに来てください。
jpg: 【185__any】Do you have any pets?／I don't have any money with me now.／You can come to me anytime.

english: Small. I live in a small town.
japanese: 私は小さな町に住んでいます。
jpg: 【186__small】I live in a small town.

english: During. I want to be abroad during the summer. I went to Disneyland during my stay in Los Angeles.
japanese: 夏の間は海外に行きたいです。ロサンゼルス滞在中にディズニーランドに行きました。
jpg: 【187__during】I want to be abroad during the summer.／I went to Disneyland during my stay in Los Angeles.

english: Nice. Thank you for the nice present. They are really nice people. Have a nice day. That's nice.
japanese: 素敵なプレゼントをありがとうございました。本当にいい人たちです。良い１日を。それはすばらしい。
jpg: 【188__nice】Thank you for the nice present.／They are really nice people.／Have a nice day.／That's nice.

english: Near. He lives near here. Don't come near her. Don't come near to me. The hotel is near to the station.
japanese: 彼はこの近くに住んでいます。彼女に近づかないでください。私に近づかないでください。ホテルは駅の近くにあります。
jpg: 【189__near】He lives near here.／Don't come near her.／Don't come near to me.／The hotel is near to the station.

english: Late. I am late for school again. Don't come home late at night. I'm sorry I'm late.
japanese: また学校に遅刻してしまいました。夜遅くに帰宅しないでください。遅くなってごめんなさい。
jpg: 【190__late】I am late for school again.／Don't come home late at night.／I'm sorry I'm late.

english: Keep. You can keep these pugs. Keep calm.
japanese: これらのパグを飼うことができます。冷静さを保つ。
jpg: 【191__keep】You can keep these pugs.／Keep calm.

english: Same. We go to the same school. And are in the same class.
japanese: 私たちは同じ学校に通っています。そして同じクラスです。
jpg: 【192__same】We go to the same school.／And are in the same class.

english: Back. Please write down your address on the back of the card. Come back by six o'clock. Please open the back door.
japanese: カード裏面に住所をご記入ください。6時までに戻ってきてください。後ろのドアを開けてください。
jpg: 【193__back】Please write down your address on the back of the card.／Come back by six o'clock.／Please open the back door.

english: Sometimes. Sometimes I take the bus to school.
japanese: 時々私はバスに乗って学校に行きます。
jpg: 【194__sometimes】Sometimes I take the bus to school.

english: Love. She loves music. Love is everything to her. I'd love to.
japanese: 彼女は音楽が大好きです。彼女にとって愛がすべてだ。私はしたいです。
jpg: 【195__love】She loves music.／Love is everything to her.／I'd love to.

english: Event. This is one of the big events for me.
japanese: これは私にとって大きな出来事の一つです。
jpg: 【196__event】This is one of the big events for me.

english: Change. Can we change our way of life? Winter always changes into spring. Let's talk about the climate change.
japanese: 私たちの生き方を変えることはできるでしょうか？冬は必ず春に変わります。気候変動について話しましょう。
jpg: 【197__change】Can we change our way of life?／Winter always changes into spring.／Let's talk about the climate change.

english: Night.Don't call me late at night. Good night.
japanese: 夜遅くに電話しないでください。おやすみなさい。
jpg: 【198__night】Don't call me late at night. Good night.

english: Ago. I saw him at the station an hour ago.
japanese: 1時間前に駅で彼に会った。
jpg: 【199__ago】I saw him at the station an hour ago.

english: Course. Can we change the course of history? I want to take a course in design.
japanese: 私たちは歴史の流れを変えることができるでしょうか？デザインのコースを受講したいです。
jpg: 【200__course】Can we change the course of history?／I want to take a course in design.

english: Lunch. What's for lunch?
japanese: 昼食は何ですか？
jpg: 【201__lunch】What's for lunch?

english: Second. My birthday is on the 2nd of September. Now, wait for 30 seconds. This is my second time in New York.
japanese: 私の誕生日は9月2日です。30 秒ほど待ちます。ニューヨークに来るのはこれで2回目です。
jpg: 【202__second】My birthday is on the 2nd of September.／Now, wait for 30 seconds.／This is my second time in New York.

english: Run. I often run in the park. She runs two restaurants.
japanese: 私はよく公園で走ります。彼女はレストランを 2 軒経営しています。
jpg: 【203__run】I often run in the park.／She runs two restaurants.

english: Listen. Please listen carefully.
japanese: よく聞いてください。
jpg: 【204__listen】Please listen carefully.

english: Number. Do you have your own ID number?
japanese: あなたは自分の識別番号を持っていますか？
jpg: 【205__number】Do you have your own ID number?

english: Library. I often go to the library.
japanese: 私はよく図書館に行きます。
jpg: 【206__library】 I often go to the library.

english: Volunteer. I want to work as a volunteer for the children.
japanese: ボランティア 子どもたちのためにボランティアとして働きたいです。
jpg: 【207__volunteer】Volunteer I want to work as a volunteer for the children.

english: Easy. Your question is easy. Take it easy.
japanese: あなたの質問は簡単です。落ち着いて。
jpg: 【208__easy】Your question is easy.／Take it easy.

english: Where? Where do you go?
japanese: どこに行きますか？
jpg: 【209__where】Where do you go?

english: Another. Can I have another piece of cake? Let's talk about it another time. Let's talk about it at another time. Buy two and get another free.
japanese: もう一個ケーキを食べてもいいですか？それについてはまた別の機会に話しましょう。それについてはまた別の機会に話しましょう。2 つ購入すると、もう 1 つ無料になります。
jpg: 【210__another】Can I have another piece of cake?／Let's talk about it another time.／Let's talk about it at another time.／Buy two and get another free.

english: Classmate. We are classmates.
japanese: 私たちはクラスメートです。
jpg: 【211__classmate】We are classmates.

english: Just. You look just like your mother. It's just after three o'clock. It's just a joke.
japanese: あなたはお母さんにそっくりですね。午後３時過ぎです。それはただの冗談です。
jpg: 【212__just】You look just like your mother.／It's just after three o'clock.／It's just a joke.

english: Man. Do you know the man?
japanese: その男を知っていますか？
jpg: 【213__man】Do you know the man?

english: Send. I often send an email to her.
japanese: 私はよく彼女にメールを送ります。
jpg: 【214__send】I often send an email to her.

english: Woman.I know the woman with long hair.
japanese: 長い髪の女性を知っています。
jpg: 【215__woman】I know the woman with long hair.

english: Cook. Do you sometimes cook dinner for your family? Cock 料理をする人 He is a good cook.
japanese: あなたは時々家族のために夕食を作りますか。Cock 料理をする人 彼は料理が上手です。
jpg: 【216__cook】Do you sometimes cook dinner for your family?／Cock 料理をする人 He is a good cook.

english: Activity. Do you enjoy your club activity?
japanese: クラブ活動は楽しいですか？
jpg: 【217__activity】Do you enjoy your club activity?

english: Internet. Internet. Do you often use the Internet?
japanese: インターネット。あなたはインターネットをよく使いますか?
jpg: 【218__Internet】Internet.／Do you often use the Internet?

english: Live. Where do you live now?
japanese: あなたは今どこに住んでいますか？
jpg: 【219__live】Where do you live now?

english: Little. Who is the little boy? I drink a little milk every day. I have little money on me now. I sleep very little these days.
japanese: 小さな男の子は誰ですか?私は毎日少しずつ牛乳を飲みます。今私にはほとんどお金がありません。最近は睡眠時間がほとんどありません。
jpg: 【220__little】Who is the little boy?／I drink a little milk every day.／I have little money on me now.／I sleep very little these days.

english: Sound. I heard a strange sound in the kitchen. This sounds impossible, but we can do it.
japanese: キッチンで変な音が聞こえました。これは不可能に思えますが、私たちにはできます。
jpg: 【221__sound】I heard a strange sound in the kitchen.／This sounds impossible, but we can do it.

english: Tea. Do you like tea?
japanese: お茶は好きですか？
jpg: 【222__tea】Do you like tea?

english: Special. She is a special person for him.
japanese: 彼女は彼にとって特別な人です。
jpg: 【223__special】She is a special person for him.

english: Win. We want to win the game. Who won first prize? Who won the first prize?
japanese: 私たちは試合に勝ちたいと思っています。一等賞を獲得したのは誰ですか?一等賞を獲得したのは誰ですか?
jpg: 【224__win】We want to win the game.／Who won first prize?／Who won the first prize?

english: Usually. I usually go to bed at 11.
japanese: 私はいつも11時に寝ます。
jpg: 【225__usually】I usually go to bed at 11.

english: Bring. Do you bring your smartphone to school?
japanese: 学校にスマホを持っていきますか？
jpg: 【226__bring】Do you bring your smartphone to school?

english: Useful. The internet is useful to us.
japanese: インターネットは私たちにとって便利です。
jpg: 【227__useful】The internet is useful to us.

english: Information. We can find good information on the internet.
japanese: インターネットで良い情報を見つけることができます。
jpg: 【228__information】We can find good information on the internet.

english: Soon. Please be here soon.
japanese: すぐに来てください。
jpg: 【229__soon】Please be here soon.

english: Famous. This restaurant is very famous.
japanese: このレストランはとても有名です。
jpg: 【230__famous】This restaurant is very famous.

english: Part. This is part of your job. I want to play an important part.
japanese: これはあなたの仕事の一部です。重要な役割を果たしたいと思っています。
jpg: 【231__part】This is part of your job.／I want to play an important part.

english: Player. She is one of the top tennis players. Do you know this piano player?
japanese: 彼女はトップテニス選手の一人です。このピアノ奏者を知っていますか？
jpg: 【232__player】She is one of the top tennis players.／Do you know this piano player?

english: Trip. Let's take a trip to Hokkaido.
japanese: 北海道へ旅行に行きましょう。
jpg: 【233__trip】Let's take a trip to Hokkaido.

english: Those. How much are those pens? These are my shoes and those are yours.
japanese: それらのペンはいくらですか?これは私の靴で、あれはあなたのものです。
jpg: 【234__those】How much are those pens?／These are my shoes and those are yours.

english: Still. Do you still live there? Careful people can still have an accident.
japanese: まだそこに住んでいますか？注意深い人でも事故に遭う可能性はあります。
jpg: 【235__still】Do you still live there?／Careful people can still have an accident.

english: Sad. You look sad.
japanese: 悲しそうだね。
jpg: 【236__sad】You look sad.

english: Car. I go to work by car.
japanese: 私は車で仕事に行きます。
jpg: 【237__car】I go to work by car.

english: Animal hope. How many animals in the zoo do you know?
japanese: あなたは動物園で動物を何匹知っていますか?
jpg: 【238__animal】How many animals in the zoo do you know?

english: Favorite. Blue is my favorite color. This cup is my favorite.
japanese: 青は私の好きな色です。このカップは私のお気に入りです。
jpg: 【239__favorite】Blue is my favorite color.／This cup is my favorite.

english: Put. Don't put your clothes on your bed.
japanese: ベッドの上に服を置かないでください。
jpg: 【240__put】Don't put your clothes on your bed.

english: Care 1世話介護注意 She is busy with childcare. We all care about our appearance.
japanese: 私たちは皆、自分の外見を気にします。
jpg: 【241__care】We all care about our appearance.

english: Choose. We want to choose her as the team manager.
japanese: 私たちは彼女をチームマネージャーに選びたいと思っています。
jpg: 【242__choose】We want to choose her as the team manager.

english: Minute. Wait there for 10 minutes. Wait a minute.
japanese: そこで10分間待ちます。ちょっと待って。
jpg: 【243__minute】Wait there for 10 minutes.／Wait a minute.

english: Worry. Don't worry.
japanese: 心配しないで。
jpg: 【244__worry】Don't worry.

english: Wow. Wow, it looks delicious.
japanese: うわー、美味しそうですね。
jpg: 【245__wow】Wow, it looks delicious.

english: Sorry. I'm sorry I'm late. I'm sorry to be late. I'm sorry to hear you're sick in bed.
japanese: 遅くなってごめんなさい。遅くなってごめんなさい。あなたが病気で寝ていると聞いて残念です。
jpg: 【246__sorry】I'm sorry I'm late.／I'm sorry to be late.／I'm sorry to hear you're sick in bed.

english: My job is difficult but it is great fun. My job is difficult but it is a lot of fun.
japanese: 私の仕事は難しいですが、とても楽しいです。
jpg: 【247__fun】My job is difficult but it is a lot of fun.

english: Language. I speak three languages.
japanese: 私は 3 か国語を話します。
jpg: 【248__language】I speak three languages.

english: Sleep. I usually sleep well. I am tired, so I want to get some sleep.
japanese: 私は普段よく眠っています。疲れているので少し寝たいです。
jpg: 【249__sleep】I usually sleep well.／I am tired, so I want to get some sleep.

english: Light. I keep away from strong light in the summer. Turn on the light. Turn off the light. It is still light out. Your bag is light.
japanese: 夏は強い光を避けます。ライトをつけてください。明かりを消す。まだ明るいです。あなたのカバンは軽いです。
jpg: 【250__light】I keep away from strong light in the summer.／Turn on the light.／Turn off the light.／It is still light out.／Your bag is light.

english: Vegetable. Eat more vegetables for your health.
japanese: 健康のためにもっと野菜を食べましょう。
jpg: 【251__vegetable】Eat more vegetables for your health.

english: Wait. Please wait in front of the movie theater.
japanese: 映画館の前でお待ちください。
jpg: 【252__wait】Please wait in front of the movie theater.

english: Anything. Do you buy anything at the store? Don't do anything dangerous. You can do anything.
japanese: その店で何か買いますか？危険なことはしないでください。何でもできます。
jpg: 【253__anything】Do you buy anything at the store?／Don't do anything dangerous.／You can do anything.

english: Yesterday. How is yesterday's game? I went to the movies yesterday.
japanese: 昨日の試合はどうでしたか？昨日映画に行きました。
jpg: 【254__yesterday】How is yesterday's game?／I went to the movies yesterday.

english: Fish 魚 You can see many small fish in the river. I like to fish in the sea.
japanese: 私は海で釣りをするのが好きです。
jpg: 【255__fish】I like to fish in the sea.

english: Front. Please come to the front. A lot of people are at the front door.
japanese: 前までお越しください。正面玄関にはたくさんの人がいます。
jpg: 【256__front】Please come to the front.／A lot of people are at the front door.

english: Drink. What do you want to drink? Do you have cold drinks?
japanese: 何を飲みたいですか？冷たい飲み物はありますか？
jpg: 【257__drink】What do you want to drink?／Do you have cold drinks?

english: Hour. Please be back in an hour.
japanese: 1時間以内に戻ってきてください。
jpg: 【258__hour】Please be back in an hour.

english: Travel. She wants to travel abroad in the future. Do you like air travel?
japanese: 彼女は将来海外旅行に行きたいと思っています。空の旅は好きですか？
jpg: 【259__travel】She wants to travel abroad in the future.／Do you like air travel?

english: Sing. We often sing songs.
japanese: 私たちはよく歌を歌います。
jpg: 【260__sing】We often sing songs.

english: Movie. Let's go to the movies on Sunday.
japanese: 日曜日に映画に行きましょう。
jpg: 【261__movie】Let's go to the movies on Sunday.

english: Vacation. They went to Spain on vacation.
japanese: 彼らは休暇でスペインに行きました。
jpg: 【262__vacation】They went to Spain on vacation.

english: Dance. I like dancing to the muse hook. Please show us some traditional dances.
japanese: ミューズのフックに合わせて踊るのが好きです。伝統的な踊りをいくつか見せてください。
jpg: 【263__dance】I like dancing to the muse hook.／Please show us some traditional dances.

english: Dinner. What's for dinner, Mom?
japanese: お母さん、夕食は何ですか？
jpg: 【264__dinner】What's for dinner, Mom?

english: Rice. Can you boil rice?
japanese: ご飯を炊いてもらえますか？
jpg: 【265__rice】Can you boil rice?

english: Out. I don't go out alone at night.
japanese: 私は夜に一人で外出しません。
jpg: 【266__out】I don't go out alone at night.

english: Plan. What's your plan for the vacation? I'm planning a trip to Hokkaido. I'm planning to go on a trip to Hokkaido.
japanese: 休暇の計画は何ですか?北海道への旅行を計画しています。北海道へ旅行に行く予定です。
jpg: 【267__plan】What's your plan for the vacation?／I'm planning a trip to Hokkaido.／I'm planning to go on a trip to Hokkaido.

english: Hand. Wash your hands clean.
japanese: 手をきれいに洗ってください。
jpg: 【268__hand】Wash your hands clean.

english: History. My brother studies history at college.
japanese: 私の兄（弟）は大学で歴史を学んでいます。
jpg: 【269__history】My brother studies history at college.

english: Wear. She likes to wear black clothes.
japanese: 彼女は黒い服を着るのが好きです。
jpg: 【270__wear】She likes to wear black clothes.

english: Song.Let's sing a song together.
japanese: 一緒に歌を歌いましょう。
jpg: 【271__song】Let's sing a song together.

english: Excited. I am excited to get an email from her.
japanese: 彼女からメールを受け取るのが楽しみです。
jpg: 【272__excited】I am excited to get an email from her.

english: Paper. Do you need a pen and paper? Do you need a pen and some paper? Where is today's paper? I see a lot of papers on his desk.
japanese: ペンと紙が必要ですか?ペンと紙が必要ですか?今日の新聞はどこにありますか？彼の机の上にたくさんの書類があるのが見えます。
jpg: 【273__paper】Do you need a pen and paper?／Do you need a pen and some paper?／Where is today's paper?／I see a lot of papers on his desk.

english: Lose. He often loses his keys. We don't want to lose the game.
japanese: 彼はよく鍵をなくします。我々は試合に負けたくない。
jpg: 【274__lose】He often loses his keys.／We don't want to lose the game.

english: Fast. She is a fast runner. You walk too fast.
japanese: 彼女は走るのが速いです。歩くのが速すぎます。
jpg: 【275__fast】She is a fast runner.／You walk too fast.

english: Hold. What do you hold in your hand? They hold a meeting once a month.
japanese: 手に何を持っていますか？彼らは月に一度会議を開きます。
jpg: 【276__hold】What do you hold in your hand?／They hold a meeting once a month.

english: Over. I cross over the street. Children over the age of 12 can join the event. The river is wide. Can we swim over? All is over with him.
japanese: 私は通りを渡ります。12 歳以上のお子様がイベントに参加できます。川は広いです。泳いで渡ってもいいですか？彼にとってはすべてが終わったのだ。
jpg: 【277__over】I cross over the street.／Children over the age of 12 can join the event.／The river is wide.／Can we swim over?／All is over with him.

english: We can't. What do you two on the weekend?
japanese: 週末は二人で何をしますか？
jpg: 【278__weekend】What do you two on the weekend?

english: Homework.Finish your homework first.
japanese: まずは宿題を終わらせなさい。
jpg: 【279__homework】Finish your homework first.

english: Afternoon. We play soccer in the afternoon. Good afternoon.
japanese: 私たちは午後にサッカーをします。こんにちは。
jpg: 【280__afternoon】We play soccer in the afternoon.／Good afternoon.

english: Open. Open the window, please. The store opens at ten. All the windows are open.
japanese: 窓を開けてください。店は10時に開きます。すべての窓が開いています。
jpg: 【281__open】Open the window, please.／The store opens at ten.／All the windows are open.

english: Save. We want to save a lot of people. I want to save, honey. And traveled to many countries. Your information saves me a lot of time.
japanese: 私たちは多くの人を救いたいと思っています。救いたいのよ、ハニー。そして多くの国を旅しました。あなたの情報のおかげで時間を大幅に節約できます。
jpg: 【282__save】We want to save a lot of people.／I want to save, honey.／And traveled to many countries.／Your information saves me a lot of time.

english: Abroad. I want to go abroad in the future.
japanese: 将来は海外に行きたいです。
jpg: 【283__abroad】I want to go abroad in the future.

english: Parent! My parents teach at school.
japanese: 私の両親は学校で教えています。
jpg: 【284__parent】My parents teach at school.

english: Happen. What happened to them?
japanese: 彼らに何が起こったのでしょうか？
jpg: 【285__happen】What happened to them?

english: Message. Can I leave a message for Mr. Brown?
japanese: ブラウンさんにメッセージを残してもいいですか？
jpg: 【286__message】Can I leave a message for Mr.／Brown?

english: Into. Put it into this bag.
japanese: この袋に入れてください。
jpg: 【287__into】Put it into this bag.

english: Elementary school. Her mother is a teacher of an elementary school.
japanese: 彼女の母親は小学校の教師です。
jpg: 【288__elementary_school】Her mother is a teacher of an elementary school.

english: Bad. I have a bad cold.
japanese: ひどい風邪をひいてしまいました。
jpg: 【289__bad】I have a bad cold.

english: Tomorrow. Tomorrow is my birthday. See you tomorrow!
japanese: 明日は私の誕生日です。また明日ね！
jpg: 【290__tomorrow】Tomorrow is my birthday.／See you tomorrow!

english: Welcome. Welcome to New York. Come and see us again. You're always welcome. You're welcome.
japanese: ニューヨークへようこそ。また会いに来てください。いつでも大歓迎です。どういたしまして。
jpg: 【291__welcome】Welcome to New York.／Come and see us again.／You're always welcome.／You're welcome.

english: Clothes. I want to buy some new clothes for the summer.
japanese: 夏に向けて新しい服を買いたいと思っています。
jpg: 【292__clothes】I want to buy some new clothes for the summer.

english: Color 이런. What colors do you like?
japanese: 何色が好きですか？
jpg: 【293__color】What colors do you like?

english: Warm. It is warm today. She is kind and warm. I usually warm milk up.
japanese: 今日は暖かいですね。彼女は優しくて温かいです。私はよく牛乳を温めます。
jpg: 【294__warm】It is warm today.／She is kind and warm.／I usually warm milk up.

english: Easily. You can easily get such information on the internet.
japanese: このような情報はインターネット上で簡単に入手できます。
jpg: 【295__easily】You can easily get such information on the internet.

english: Cannot. He cannot swim.
japanese: 彼は泳げません。
jpg: 【296__cannot】He cannot swim.

english: Performance. His performance is very good.
japanese: 彼のパフォーマンスはとても良いです。
jpg: 【297__performance】His performance is very good.

english: Spring. Do you like spring or fall? The spring water there is good.
japanese: 春と秋どっちが好きですか？そこの湧き水は美味しいです。
jpg: 【298__spring】Do you like spring or fall?／The spring water there is good.

english: Season. What is your favorite season?
japanese: あなたの好きな季節は何ですか？
jpg: 【299__season】What is your favorite season?

english: Cold. I want a cold drink. It's really cold outside. Do you often catch a cold?
japanese: 冷たい飲み物が欲しいです。外は本当に寒いです。あなたはよく風邪を引きますか?
jpg: 【300__cold】I want a cold drink.／It's really cold outside.／Do you often catch a cold?

english: Almost. We play baseball almost every day.
japanese: 私たちはほぼ毎日野球をします。
jpg: 【301__almost】We play baseball almost every day.

english: P.m.I go to bed at 11 p.m
japanese: 私は午後11時に寝ます。
jpg: 【302__p.m.】I go to bed at 11 p.m

english: Early. I usually get up early. My father goes fishing in the early morning.
japanese: 私はいつも早く起きます。父は早朝に釣りに行きます。
jpg: 【303__early】I usually get up early.／My father goes fishing in the early morning.

english: Forget. I forgot his phone number. Don't forget to finish your homework before dinner.
japanese: 彼の電話番号を忘れてしまいました。夕食前に宿題を終わらせるのを忘れないでください。
jpg: 【304__forget】I forgot his phone number.／Don't forget to finish your homework before dinner.

english: Tired. We are tired after the long practice.
japanese: 私たちは長い練習の後で疲れています。
jpg: 【305__tired】We are tired after the long practice.

english: Delicious. Dinner is delicious.
japanese: 夕食はおいしいです。
jpg: 【306__delicious】Dinner is delicious.

english: Off. He saw a police officer and ran off. The sign says Keep off the grass.
japanese: 彼は警察官を見て逃走した。標識には「草を避けてください」と書かれています。
jpg: 【307__off】He saw a police officer and ran off.／The sign says Keep off the grass.

english: Sick. My mother is sick in bed.
japanese: 私の母は病気で寝ています。
jpg: 【308__sick】My mother is sick in bed.

english: Free. Are you free tonight? I have free tickets to the night game.
japanese: 今夜は空いていますか？ナイターの無料チケットを持っています。
jpg: 【309__free】Are you free tonight?／I have free tickets to the night game.

english: Hot. It's so hot today.
japanese: 今日はとても暑いですね。
jpg: 【310__hot】It's so hot today.

english: Sit. We sat on the bench and had sandwiches.
japanese: 私たちはベンチに座ってサンドイッチを食べました。
jpg: 【311__sit】We sat on the bench and had sandwiches.

english: Cool. It became cool in the evening. All his songs are cool. I love them.
japanese: 夕方は涼しくなってきました。彼の曲はどれもカッコいいです。私は彼らを愛しています。
jpg: 【312__cool】It became cool in the evening.／All his songs are cool.／I love them.

english: Away. Stay away from the fire.
japanese: 火から遠ざけてください。
jpg: 【313__away】Stay away from the fire.

english: Present. He gave a bike to his son as a birthday present.
japanese: 彼は息子に誕生日プレゼントとして自転車を贈った。
jpg: 【314__present】He gave a bike to his son as a birthday present.

english: Check. After the exam, I checked my answers. Mark the right answers with the check.
japanese: 試験の後、私は自分の答えを確認しました。正しい答えにはチェックマークを付けてください。
jpg: 【315__check】After the exam, I checked my answers.／Mark the right answers with the check.

english: Mine. Whose shoes are these? They are mine.
japanese: これは誰の靴ですか？それらは私のものです。
jpg: 【316__mine】Whose shoes are these? They are mine.

english: Uncle. I have two uncles.
japanese: 私には叔父が二人います。
jpg: 【317__uncle】I have two uncles.

english: Follow. I followed his advice and went to see the doctor. My dog followed me.
japanese: 私は彼のアドバイスに従い、医者に会いに行きました。私の犬が私についてきました。
jpg: 【318__follow】I followed his advice and went to see the doctor.／My dog followed me.

english: Hundred. The little boy can count to 100 now. About four hundred students are in our school.
japanese: その小さな男の子は今では100まで数えられるようになりました。私たちの学校には約400人の生徒がいます。
jpg: 【319__hundred】The little boy can count to 100 now.／About four hundred students are in our school.

english: Left. Can you eat with your left hand? Please turn left at the next corner. You can see Mount Fuji on your left. You can see Mount Fuji on the left.
japanese: 左手で食事できますか？次の角を左折してください。左手に富士山が見えます。左手に富士山が見えます。
jpg: 【320__left】Can you eat with your left hand?／Please turn left at the next corner.／You can see Mount Fuji on your left.／You can see Mount Fuji on the left.

english: Chinese. My brother studies Chinese at college. Do you like Chinese food?
japanese: 私の兄は大学で中国語を勉強しています。中華料理は好きですか？
jpg: 【321__Chinese】My brother studies Chinese at college.／Do you like Chinese food?

english: Concert. I went to a piano concert last Friday.
japanese: 先週の金曜日にピアノのコンサートに行きました。
jpg: 【322__concert】I went to a piano concert last Friday.

english: Evening He came back late in the evening.
japanese: 彼は夕方遅くに戻ってきました。
jpg: 【323__evening】He came back late in the evening.

english: Snow 雪 We had a lot of snow this winter. It snows a lot in winter.
japanese: 冬には雪がたくさん降ります。
jpg: 【324__snow】It snows a lot in winter.

english: Poster. I have some posters of movie stars on the wall of my room.
japanese: 私は自分の部屋の壁に映画スターのポスターを何枚か貼っています。
jpg: 【325__poster】I have some posters of movie stars on the wall of my room.

english: Field. I see some cows in the field. He is one of the great scientists in this field. Yesterday, I went to a baseball field for the first time.
japanese: 野原に牛が数頭見えます。彼はこの分野の偉大な科学者の一人です。昨日、初めて野球場に行きました。
jpg: 【326__field】I see some cows in the field.／He is one of the great scientists in this field.／Yesterday, I went to a baseball field for the first time.

english: Break. Don't break the cup. The glass fell from the table and broke. Now let's take a break for 15 minutes.
japanese: カップを割らないでください。ガラスがテーブルから落ちて割れてしまいました。では、15分間休憩しましょう。
jpg: 【327__break】Don't break the cup.／The glass fell from the table and broke.／Now let's take a break for 15 minutes.

english: Fall. I often fall on the ice. Rain falls from the sky. The leaves of this tree turn yellow in fall. The leaves of this tree turn yellow in the fall.
japanese: 私はよく氷の上に落ちます。雨が空から降ってきます。この木の葉は秋には黄色に変わります。この木の葉は秋には黄色に変わります。
jpg: 【328__fall】I often fall on the ice.／Rain falls from the sky.／The leaves of this tree turn yellow in fall.／The leaves of this tree turn yellow in the fall.

english: Short. His hair was short. He had short hair.
japanese: 彼の髪は短かった。彼は短い髪をしていました。
jpg: 【329__short】His hair was short.／He had short hair.

english: Face. I wash my face at 7 am. Don't be afraid and face the problems.
japanese: 私は朝7時に顔を洗います。恐れずに問題に向き合ってください。
jpg: 【330__face】I wash my face at 7 am.／Don't be afraid and face the problems.

english: Ski. I usually ski in Hokkaido. He fell and broke one of the skis.
japanese: 私は普段北海道でスキーをしています。彼は転んでスキー板の1枚を壊した。
jpg: 【331__ski】I usually ski in Hokkaido.／He fell and broke one of the skis.

english: Local. We had a wonderful dinner at a local restaurant.
japanese: 私たちは地元のレストランで素晴らしいディナーを食べました。
jpg: 【332__local】We had a wonderful dinner at a local restaurant.

english: Rain. He went out in the rain. It rained hard.
japanese: 彼は雨の中を出かけた。雨が激しく降りました。
jpg: 【333__rain】He went out in the rain.／It rained hard.

english: Mom. Mama. My mom is a doctor.
japanese: ママ。私の母は医者です。
jpg: 【334__mom】My mom is a doctor.

english: Mt. We can see Mt. Fuji from here.
japanese: ここからは富士山が見えます。
jpg: 【335__Mt.】We can see Mt.／Fuji from here.

english: Office. My father goes to his office by subway.
japanese: 私の父は地下鉄で会社に行きます。
jpg: 【336__office】My father goes to his office by subway.

english: Outside. We usually played outside after school. I waited outside the store. The house looked nice from the outside. She turned on the outside light.
japanese: 私たちは放課後はたいてい外で遊びました。店の外で待っていました。家は外から見ると素敵に見えました。彼女は外の明かりをつけました。
jpg: 【337__outside】We usually played outside after school.／I waited outside the store.／The house looked nice from the outside.／She turned on the outside light.

english: Catch. Please catch this ball.
japanese: このボールをキャッチしてください。
jpg: 【338__catch】Please catch this ball.

english: Aunt. My aunt and her daughter live in the country.
japanese: 私の叔母と彼女の娘は田舎に住んでいます。
jpg: 【339__aunt】My aunt and her daughter live in the country.

english: Door. Someone knocked on the door. Please come in the door. Please come in the front door.
japanese: 誰かがドアをノックしました。ドアの中に入ってください。正面玄関からお入りください。
jpg: 【340__door】Someone knocked on the door.／Please come in the door.／Please come in the front door.

english: Turn. Turn left at the corner. I turn the handle quietly.
japanese: 角を左折してください。私は静かにハンドルを回します。
jpg: 【341__turn】Turn left at the corner.／I turn the handle quietly.

english: Dear. Dear Mr. Smith, Oh dear. I can't find my key.
japanese: 親愛なるスミスさん、ああ、親愛なる。鍵が見つかりません。
jpg: 【342__dear】Dear Mr.／Smith, ／Oh dear.／I can't find my key.

english: Subject. My favorite subject is PE. Now, let's change the subject.
japanese: 私の好きな科目は体育です。さて、話題を変えましょう。
jpg: 【343__subject】My favorite subject is PE.／Now, let's change the subject.

english: Weather How is the weather? What is the weather like?
japanese: 天気はどうですか？ / お天気はいかがですか？
jpg: 【344__weather】How is the weather?／What is the weather like?

english: Shoe. She put on her shoes. She took off her shoes.
japanese: 彼女は靴を履いた。彼女は靴を脱ぎました。
jpg: 【345__shoe】She put on her shoes.／She took off her shoes.

english: Fan. He is a fan of the rock group. The fan doesn't work.
japanese: 彼はロックグループのファンです。ファンが作動しません。
jpg: 【346__fan】He is a fan of the rock group.／The fan doesn't work.

english: Pass. We talked to each other and passed the bank. Luckily, I passed the test. The summer vacation passed so fast. Pass me the salt, please.
japanese: 私たちはお互いに話し合って銀行の前を通りました。幸いなことに、私は試験に合格しました。夏休みはあっという間に過ぎてしまいました。塩をください。
jpg: 【347__pass】We talked to each other and passed the bank.／Luckily, I passed the test.／The summer vacation passed so fast.／Pass me the salt, please.

english: Quickly. Don't eat so quickly.
japanese: そんなに早く食べないでください。
jpg: 【348__quickly】Don't eat so quickly.

english: We walked along the river early in the morning. My dog runs along at my side.
japanese: 私の犬が私の横を走ります。
jpg: 【349__along】My dog runs along at my side.

english: Poor. They were poor in those days. The poor child stands alone in the rain.
japanese: 当時彼らは貧しかった。可哀想な子供は雨の中一人で立っています。
jpg: 【350__poor】They were poor in those days.／The poor child stands alone in the rain.

english: Sell. The store sells vegetables and fruits.
japanese: その店では野菜や果物を販売しています。
jpg: 【351__sell】The store sells vegetables and fruits.

english: Center. The hotel is in the center of the city.
japanese: ホテルは市内中心部にあります。
jpg: 【352__center】The hotel is in the center of the city.

english: Amazing. Her performance was really amazing.
japanese: 彼女のパフォーマンスは本当に素晴らしかったです。
jpg: 【353__amazing】Her performance was really amazing.

english: Ticket. I have two tickets for the concert.
japanese: 私はそのコンサートのチケットを２枚持っています。
jpg: 【354__ticket】I have two tickets for the concert.

english: A.m.She works at the bookstore from 10 a.m.
japanese: 彼女は午前10時から本屋で働いています。
jpg: 【355__a.m.】She works at the bookstore from 10 a.m.

english: Phone. We talked on the phone for an hour.
japanese: 私たちは1時間電話で話しました。
jpg: 【356__phone】We talked on the phone for an hour.

english: Perform. She performed on the piano very well. They performed the experiment.
japanese: 彼女はピアノでとても上手に演奏しました。彼らは実験を行った。
jpg: 【357__perform】She performed on the piano very well.／They performed the experiment.

english: Breakfast. What did you have for breakfast?
japanese: 朝食には何を食べましたか？
jpg: 【358__breakfast】What did you have for breakfast?

english: Careful! She is a careful driver.
japanese: 彼女は慎重な運転手です。
jpg: 【359__careful】She is a careful driver.

english: Age. Please write your name and age on the paper.
japanese: 紙に氏名と年齢を記入してください。
jpg: 【360__age】 Please write your name and age on the paper.

english: Cut. He cut his finger with a knife.
japanese: 彼はナイフで指を切りました。
jpg: 【361__cut】He cut his finger with a knife.

english: Someday. She wants to be an animator someday.
japanese: 彼女はいつかアニメーターになりたいと思っています。
jpg: 【362__someday】She wants to be an animator someday.

english: We collected dry sticks for the fire. A few pages stuck together.
japanese: 私たちは火を焚くために、乾いた枝を集めました。数ページがくっついてしまった。
jpg: 【363__stick】We collected dry sticks for the fire.／A few pages stuck together.

english: May. You may be right. May I ask you a question?
japanese: あなたは正しいかもしれません。質問してもいいですか？
jpg: 【364__may】You may be right.／May I ask you a question?

english: Uniform. We wear the school uniform.
japanese: 私たちは学校の制服を着ています。
jpg: 【365__uniform】We wear the school uniform.

english: Climb. I want to climb Mount Fuji.
japanese: 富士山に登りたいです。
jpg: 【366__climb】I want to climb Mount Fuji.

english: Gym.My dad goes to the gym once a week.
japanese: 父は週に1回、ジムに通っています。
jpg: 【367__gym】My dad goes to the gym once a week.

english: Hungry.Are you hungry?
japanese: お腹は空いていますか？
jpg: 【368__hungry】Are you hungry?

english: Football.I want to play football in high school.
japanese: 高校ではサッカー部に入りたいです。
jpg: 【369__football】I want to play football in high school.

english: Line. Please stand in line. Cut the paper along the line.
japanese: 列にお並びください。線に沿って紙を切ります。
jpg: 【370__line】Please stand in line.／Cut the paper along the line.

english: Orange. I like apples and oranges. The sky turned orange before sunset.
japanese: 私はリンゴとオレンジが好きです。日没前に空がオレンジ色に染まりました。
jpg: 【371__orange】I like apples and oranges.／The sky turned orange before sunset.

english: Thousand. This ticket is two thousand yen. The population of this village is about two thousand.
japanese: このチケットは二千円です。この村の人口は約 2,000 人です。
jpg: 【372__thousand】This ticket is two thousand yen.／The population of this village is about two thousand.

english: Touch. Don't touch any paintings. We kept in touch after graduation.
japanese: 絵画には触れないでください。卒業後も連絡を取り合いました。
jpg: 【373__touch】Don't touch any paintings.／We kept in touch after graduation.

english: Yours. These are mine. Yours are there.
japanese: これらは私のものです。あなたのものはそこにあります。
jpg: 【374__yours】These are mine.／Yours are there.

english: O'clock. I got up at six o'clock in the morning.
japanese: 私は朝6時に起きました。
jpg: 【375__o'clock】I got up at six o'clock in the morning.

english: Relax. After a busy day, He took a bath and relaxed.
japanese: 忙しい一日を終えた後、彼はお風呂に入ってリラックスしました。
jpg: 【376__relax】After a busy day, He took a bath and relaxed.

english: T-shirt. I usually wear a T-shirt and jeans.
japanese: Tシャツ。私は普段Tシャツとジーンズを着ています。
jpg: 【377__T-shirt】I usually wear a T-shirt and jeans.

english: Hers. Whose bag is this? It's hers.
japanese: これは誰のバッグですか?それは彼女のものです。
jpg: 【378__hers】Whose bag is this?／It's hers.

english: Against. Are you against my plan?
japanese: 私の計画に反対ですか？
jpg: 【379__against】Are you against my plan?

english: Mrs. Hello, Mrs. White.
japanese: こんにちは、ホワイトさん。
jpg: 【380__Mrs.】Hello, Mrs.／White.

english: Miss. I missed the bus to school and was late. We really miss you.
japanese: 学校行きのバスに乗り遅れて遅刻してしまいました。本当に寂しかったです。
jpg: 【381__miss】I missed the bus to school and was late.／We really miss you.

english: Dad. My dad is a doctor.
japanese: 私の父は医者です。
jpg: 【382__dad】My dad is a doctor.

english: Wish. I wish you good luck. I have a wish to travel around the world.
japanese: 幸運を祈ります。私には世界中を旅したいという願望があります。
jpg: 【383__wish】I wish you good luck.／I have a wish to travel around the world.

english: Behind. He hid behind the big tree. Don't leave anything behind.
japanese: 彼は大きな木の後ろに隠れました。何も残さないでください。
jpg: 【384__behind】He hid behind the big tree.／Don't leave anything behind.

english: Drop. I drop the key at the front door. The temperature dropped soon after the sunset. Rain is very small drops of water.
japanese: 玄関に鍵を落としてしまいました。日没後すぐに気温が下がりました。雨はとても小さな水滴です。
jpg: 【385__drop】I drop the key at the front door.／The temperature dropped soon after the sunset.／Rain is very small drops of water.

english: Set. I want to buy a new set of dishes. In tennis, six games make up a set. Please set these books on the shelf. The sun began to set.
japanese: 新しい食器セットを買いたいです。テニスでは 6 つのゲームが 1 セットとなります。これらの本を本棚に並べてください。太陽が沈み始めました。
jpg: 【386__set】I want to buy a new set of dishes.／In tennis, six games make up a set.／Please set these books on the shelf.／The sun began to set.

english: Bath. I take a bath at about 10 o'clock.
japanese: 10時くらいにお風呂に入ります。
jpg: 【387__bath】I take a bath at about 10 o'clock.

english: Case. Usually he is wrong, but in this case he is right. Did you see my pencil case?
japanese: 通常、彼は間違っていますが、この場合は彼が正しいです。私の筆箱を見ましたか？
jpg: 【388__case】Usually he is wrong, but in this case he is right.／Did you see my pencil case?

english: Towel.He dried his hands with a towel.
japanese: 彼はタオルで手を拭きました。
jpg: 【389__towel】He dried his hands with a towel.

english: Trumpet. He can play the trumpet.
japanese: 彼はトランペットを吹くことができます。
jpg: 【390__trumpet】He can play the trumpet.

english: Four. The train is full. I waited for two full weeks. The moon is full.
